reviews.review_description: It gets repetitive and boring.
Idk
No people are on and boring

It has some very good mechanics and me and my friend really enjoy it. But the problem is, you only have 15 minutes a day, so you need to pay to be able to play more and I just find that so annoying. I don't want to have to waste my money playing this game when it would have been so easy to just make a free demo and a paid full release.
Everything is good. You shouldn’t make it where the demo is longer than 15 minutes. ￼ and I really hope you do because this game is kind of addicting. ￼

Its the best mech game because your abilities are shoot, turn in to a ball, use your Crain and I'm probably missing some and you can do multiplayer and more like missions and customize your mech.
One more thing the mech kid a looks like a spider🕷
It's a great game just needs more players

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! The game is now free to play for 15 mins per day with an optional In-App-Purchase to unlock the time limit. Hoping this will increase the player count (and we are still in early access, so more and more players are discovering the game every day).

reviews.review_description:
You can see this game in my top 10 app lab list here: https://youtu.be/bwGl1PFWceA

Or just search 'VR Reviews' in YouTube.

Great shooter with awesome movement mechanics. Being able to grapple and roll around at break neck speed really makes this game stand out from other shooters. I've added it as a game in my top 10 app lab list.
Very cool, I like it alot.   I found the blinders this morning.  Really enjoying the game.

You can really kick some butt in this game if you get good. It's a blast to swing over the head of a rival only to blast them into oblivion. This game is a hoot-n-a-holler, especially if you get a group of folks to play with.

It's an immersive mech shooter where they have some really cool and authentic movement mechanics such as rolling, jumping, and even grappling (which feels very satisfying). Overall, it's a really well made and fun game that has a ton of potential. Absolutely worth picking up

Great mech design. It is a walker for accuracy, a roller for speed, and a Spiderman for awesome acrobatic tricks. For a barebones base game start it is Great. If more maps and game modes are added (and maybe usable cockpit controls for emersion) it would be a must buy for mech fans. It really deserves a community of players.

I just saw the new video and there is continued development. The new video looks great and I will continue to follow it. The 15 minutes a day is a great way to market the game. I wish more multi player game would follow this model. 5 stars for the gaem and 5 extra stars for the inspirational marketing idea.

reviews.review_title: A great Physics based FPS Mech Shooter
reviews.review_description: This game reminds me a ton of "Marble games" similar to Marble Blast and Super Monkey Ball but with it being a Mech that can turn into a ball or walk with it's 4 legs. It has very good gameplay and i love swinging around and shooting targets. I played the demo first and after finishing it, i HAD TO buy this cos i love the concept of this. Hopefuly this gets ported to Rift and not just Quest to get more players cos i would love to play it with a friend who has a Rift and would LOVE this game.

reviews.review_title: Great start for a mech game.
reviews.review_description:
A great Metroid prime like Mech game on the good start!
Also, a very revolutionary payment system.
Try it!
And I hope it gets there one day.  What we have here is a really fun playground
Hopefully they will come out with bigger arenas open worlds. It's actually quite fun in this game I enjoyed the early access version and I want to purchase.
The game was fun and funny but I wish I was free
This is a pretty good game but there are not many players so if you are playing this don't expect to meet new people
I think you should make this a none  demo and free bec there is not many good free games like this pls

A great game . The locomotion of the mech is really good. You can climb (even upside down), swing with grab hooks or roll through the arena. There is 4 player Deathmatch, Time Attack, Target hunt  with online leaderboards and a playground with a kind of "rocket league" soccer field. I really like it and play it almost every Day. You can try it every day for 15 minutes or purchase the unlocked version.
